No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication or its specific targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly teaches technical skills in data analysis and programming for employment and effective decision-making (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to water resources, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course equips students with data analysis and programming skills, fostering technological upgrading (Target 8.2) and supporting productive activities and job creation (Target 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly builds technological capabilities in data analysis, MIS, system analysis, and programming, fundamental for innovation and upgrading industrial sectors (Targets 9.5, 9.b).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to reducing income, social, or political inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to urban development, housing, or public spaces.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or resilience.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers 'information security, privacy and ethics,' supporting accountable institutions (Target 16.6) and protecting fundamental freedoms (Target 16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's focus on data analysis and organization directly contributes to statistical capacity-building and reliable data for SDG monitoring (Targets 17.18, 17.19).
